name: St. Mark Scripture Retreat
description: Join Fr. Thomas Cacciola CFR for a deep dive into the gospel of St. Mark for the feast of St. Mark the Evangelist. Featuring Adoration, Lectio, Exegesis on the gospel of Mark

name: Queen of The May
description: Fr. John Mockler will lead our Queen of the May retreat through talks, adoration, confession, the rosary, the Holy Mass, and more. All are welcome. Cost is a donation of €20

name: Young Women's Retreat
description: Join the ASCJ Sisters from Waterford for our young women's retreat with talks, Holy Mass, silence, small groups, and much more.

name: Men's Film Night with Bishop Alphonsus Cullinan
description: Join Bishop Alphonsus Cullinan of the Waterford and Lismore diocese for a film screening of 'Molokai', an adaption of the life of Saint Damian the leper priest of Molokai. Open to all men between 18-45
